title: Eat Villagers
description: Wandering Trader & Villagers drops meat and you cat eat it - new Food
body:
With this mod, Wandering traders and villagers will drop meat at death that we can eat

![creative](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/9071e7ce8d7642dd64806cac0438c338f3787d9a.png)
